painPoints.title: Fails on multi-step commands
painPoints.description: Compound requests like 'text Mom I'll be late, then set a timer for 20 minutes' reliably break. Siri handles the first action and ignores the rest with no error signal.

painPoints.title: No memory between conversations
painPoints.description: Each Siri session is stateless. Users cannot reference earlier requests ('remind me about what I asked you yesterday') and must repeat context every time.

painPoints.title: Unreliable third-party app deep-linking
painPoints.description: Shortcuts integrations with third-party apps frequently break after app updates. Siri often opens the app home screen instead of the intended action.

painPoints.title: Frequent 'I can't help with that' refusals
painPoints.description: Siri refuses requests that Google Assistant or Alexa handle trivially (e.g., 'what's playing on Netflix right now'). Refusals feel arbitrary and erode trust.

painPoints.title: Struggles with accents and background noise
painPoints.description: Recognition accuracy drops sharply with non-US accents or ambient sound above 60 dB. Users report needing to repeat commands 3+ times in everyday environments.

painPoints.title: Apple Intelligence features delayed or region-locked
painPoints.description: Promised AI features from WWDC 2024 arrived months late and remain unavailable outside the US, UK, and AU. Heavy marketing with slow delivery damages brand trust.

featureRequests.title: Cross-app workflow automation
featureRequests.description: Chain actions across multiple apps in a single voice command without requiring a pre-built Shortcut.

featureRequests.title: Persistent context / memory
featureRequests.description: Remember user preferences, recurring tasks, and recent conversation context across sessions.

featureRequests.title: Live web search results
featureRequests.description: Answer factual questions using real-time web data instead of cached knowledge, similar to Perplexity or Google Assistant.

featureRequests.title: Proactive suggestions without privacy tradeoffs
featureRequests.description: Surface relevant suggestions (leave now, reorder groceries) based on habits without sending data to cloud.

featureRequests.title: Better Shortcuts debugging
featureRequests.description: Clear error messages and a live log when a Shortcut fails, rather than silent failure or generic 'Something went wrong'.

featureRequests.title: Third-party default app respect
featureRequests.description: Honor default app settings (browser, music, maps) set by the user rather than defaulting to Apple apps.

featureRequests.title: On-device LLM for complex Q&A
featureRequests.description: Run a capable small LLM locally for nuanced questions that currently result in a web search hand-off.

featureRequests.title: Multi-language mid-sentence switching
featureRequests.description: Detect and handle bilingual commands without requiring a language change in settings.

sentiment.summary: Siri sentiment is the most negative of any major assistant — users are not indifferent, they are actively frustrated. The dominant narrative is a decade of unfulfilled potential now being exploited by ChatGPT and Gemini. Apple Intelligence has reset expectations but delivery speed is a serious credibility problem.

competitors.name: ChatGPT (voice mode)
competitors.comparison: ChatGPT's Advanced Voice Mode is the most-cited reason users are abandoning Siri for Q&A and conversation. Its multi-turn memory and nuanced answers set a new benchmark Siri is visibly failing to match.

competitors.name: Google Assistant / Gemini
competitors.comparison: Gemini's deep Android integration and real-time search answers make it the go-to comparison for factual queries. Android users report Gemini handling cross-app workflows that Siri still cannot do after years of Shortcuts.

competitors.name: Alexa
competitors.comparison: Alexa leads in smart home control and third-party skill depth. Its 100k+ skill library contrasts with Siri's limited SiriKit surface, especially for home automation power users.

competitors.name: Perplexity AI
competitors.comparison: Perplexity is gaining as a Safari/Siri alternative for research and factual Q&A among tech-forward iOS users, though it lacks voice-native interaction.

roadmap.title: Multi-step command execution engine
roadmap.reason: Most-cited pain point across 53% of negative reviews

roadmap.title: Cross-session memory (on-device, opt-in)
roadmap.reason: Mentioned in 47% of negative discussions; addresses ChatGPT comparison directly

roadmap.title: Third-party default app enforcement
roadmap.reason: Legal pressure + 36% user complaint rate; low engineering lift

roadmap.title: Live web search integration
roadmap.reason: Appears in 58% of feature requests; direct parity gap vs. Google and ChatGPT

roadmap.title: On-device small LLM for complex Q&A
roadmap.reason: Aligns with Apple Intelligence roadmap and addresses factual refusal complaints

roadmap.title: Accent & noise robustness improvements
roadmap.reason: Accessibility gap affecting 23% of non-US English users

roadmap.title: Proactive on-device suggestions engine
roadmap.reason: Appears in 28% of feature requests; privacy angle differentiates from Google

roadmap.title: Shortcuts error logging & debugger
roadmap.reason: Developer and power-user segment blocker; low complexity to ship

roadmap.title: Multi-language bilingual command support
roadmap.reason: High-value for 20%+ of global iOS users in bilingual households
